title: 7 sed Commands for Fast Text Rewrites
summary: Rewrite files and streams faster with sed commands for substitutions, whitespace cleanup, line filtering, range printing, and quick text reshaping.

test_environment.runtime: sed available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Replace the example file names before running the commands.
Use sample text with known matches, whitespace, or line ranges.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/sed_commands_for_fast_text_rewrites.sh with real local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example file names and patterns; the commands avoid platform-specific in-place flags for macOS/Linux portability.
